title: Essential Fabric Mods
description:
List of mods that I deem pretty essential for Minecraft.

Includes a lot of performance and no-cheat quality of life mods.
body:
This is a modpack that contains a number of mods that make the experience better in an un-obtrusive way. It comes pre-configured with customisable options and config. Every mod here is considered 'fair' (even the minimap, though still disable it on servers with stricter rules such as Hoplite.).

It also has a lot of optimisation and performance mods, with FPS rivalling modpacks like Simply and Fabulously Optimised.

This modpack has nothing to do with the "Essential" mod.

Texture pack is by Sharpness and all credit goes to him.


NOTE: This is no loger maintained.
